info.name: Hotel Booking API – Full Suite
info.description:
Complete test suite for all backend API endpoints.

Setup:
1. Set collection variable `baseUrl` to your backend URL.
2. Run requests in order — scripts auto-save tokens and IDs between requests.
3. Login first (Auth or Admin Login folder) to populate `adminToken` before calling protected endpoints.

body.raw:
{
  "customer": {
    "email": "vip@example.com",
    "name": "Tran Thi B",
    "phone": "0987654321",
    "identityId": "098765432"
  },
  "roomIds": ["{{roomId}}"],
  "check_in": "2026-06-10",
  "check_out": "2026-06-13",
  "guests": { "adults": 2, "children": 0 },
  "note": "VIP guest, late check-out",
  "confirmImmediately": true
}

request.description:
channel: 'qr' (MoMo app) or 'card' (ATM/credit card).
Returns payUrl + qrCodeUrl from MoMo sandbox.
Requires PAYMENT_GATEWAY_MODE=sandbox in backend .env.

exec: pm.test('success flag is true', function () { pm.expect(res.success).to.eql(true); });

request.description:
Simulates MoMo calling your IPN endpoint after payment.
resultCode 0 = success, non-zero = failure.
Set orderId to the value saved in momoOrderId variable after creating a session.
